overview: The Wausau Common Council held its organizational meeting for the 2026-2028 term, swearing in elected officials and conducting council elections for leadership positions. The council unanimously approved suspending procedural rules to confirm mayoral appointments to boards and commissions, and a motion to postpone committee appointments to the following week failed.

agenda.item: Council Elect seated by Wausau Police and Fire Department Honor Guard, Posting of Colors, Oath of Office for Elected Officials
Common Council Elections: President, Plan Commission Member, Water Works Commission Member
Resolution Adopting Robert's Rules of Order and Standing Rules for 2026-2028
Suspend Rule 6(B) Filing and 12(A) Referral of resolutions
Confirming Appointments of the Mayor to Boards, Commissions, and Committees
Mayor's Appointments to Standing Committees for 2026-2028 Term

discussions.body: The council conducted elections for Common Council President, Plan Commission member, and Water Works Commission member. Specific vote outcomes for these elections are not recorded in the official vote records.

discussions.item: Resolution Adopting Robert's Rules of Order and Standing Rules for 2026-2028
discussions.body: This resolution was on the agenda to establish procedural rules for the new council term. The specific vote outcome is not recorded in the official records.

discussions.item: Suspend Rule 6(B) Filing and 12(A) Referral of resolutions
discussions.body: Approved 11-0. Sarah Watson moved and Bruce Trueblood seconded the motion to suspend procedural rules, allowing immediate action on subsequent items without standard filing and referral requirements.

discussions.item: Confirming Appointments of the Mayor to Boards, Commissions, and Committees
discussions.body: Approved by the council. This item confirmed Mayor Doug Diny's appointments to various city boards, commissions, and committees. Specific vote count not recorded.
Approved by the council. The resolution designated the official newspaper for city notices and publications. Specific vote count not recorded.

discussions.item: Mayor's Appointments to Standing Committees for 2026-2028 Term
discussions.body: A motion to suspend rules and postpone committee appointments to the following week failed. The standing committee appointments for the new council term proceeded as scheduled.

actionItems: Robert's Rules of Order and Standing Rules adopted for 2026-2028 council term
Mayor's appointments to boards, commissions, and committees confirmed
Official newspaper designated for city publications
Standing committee appointments for 2026-2028 term finalized
title: Wausau City Council Meeting - 4/21/26
